items.title: Ghost Orgy press kit

items.title: Listen to Ghost Orgy
items.content_text: Start with Salt and The Sky That Fears Us, then follow Ghost Orgy on the main listening platforms.

items.title: Salt is available
items.content_text: Salt is the debut album by Ghost Orgy, a Phoenix-based experimental post-hardcore project by Jack Dyer.
